summary: Time to buy phones from outside India? Sanchar Saathi might be a helpful app today, but forcing every phone to ship with a government app is a worrying precedent. https:// 9to5mac.com/2025/12/01/india-o rders-apple-to-pre-instal-an-undeletable-state-security-app-on-iphones/
content:
Time to buy phones from outside India? Sanchar Saathi might be a helpful app today, but forcing every phone to ship with a government app is a worrying precedent.
